name: ppt-image-first
description: Universal image-first PPT creation harness for reference-driven, asset-aware presentation decks.

interface.longDescription: Create consistent, high-quality presentation decks from user goals, source materials, reference images, and asset manifests. Includes intake, style cards, slide blueprints, prompt packs, review loops, security rules, and PPTX assembly guidance.
defaultPrompt: Create a polished PPT from my materials.
Redesign this deck using my reference image.
